step_1_image_prompt: A 25-year-old Mediterranean woman with sun-kissed deep-tan skin, green almond eyes, and brunette-with-blonde-balayage waves to her mid-back, captured in a candid amateur smartphone snapshot with natural skin texture and visible pores. She is wearing a charcoal grey ribbed long-sleeve cropped pullover with sleeves long enough to cover her hands partially, high-waisted dark wash relaxed jeans with a slight crop hem, white minimalist sneakers, hair down in soft waves, layered thin gold necklaces, small gold huggie hoops. She stands at a sleek built-in coffee bar in a modern kitchen, espresso machine on the counter behind her, a small open shelf above with arranged ceramic mugs, white marble counter surface in front of the espresso machine, a small ceramic tray on the counter with a folded linen napkin and a small wood spoon. Standing facing the coffee bar at a three-quarter angle to the camera, weight on her right leg, looking down toward chest level with a soft confident smile. Both hands are visible in the frame, not in her pockets, not behind her back, not cropped out of frame. Her left hand rests lightly on the marble counter edge. Her right hand is at upper-chest level, palm angled inward, fingers in a relaxed open pinch position, currently empty. Cool overhead pendant lighting on the coffee bar combined with warm morning daylight from a window on the right side of the frame, mixed cool and warm wash on her face. Shot on Sony A7IV 35mm lens shallow depth of field. Real photograph, not AI-generated, no model pose, candid moment. Morning ritual polished casual energy mood, palette of charcoal grey, dark denim, warm marble, espresso brown, brass accents. Reference image is the persona — preserve her face, eye color, eye shape, brow shape, nose shape, lip shape, jaw line, and hair color exactly. Do not improvise her face.
